name: dev-project-launcher
title: Dev Project Launcher
description: Manage and launch your dev projects — open in PhpStorm, start DDEV/Docker Compose, open terminal, launch in browser.
author: philipp

commands.name: list-projects
commands.title: Projects
commands.subtitle: Dev Project Launcher
commands.description: Browse, manage, and launch your dev projects

preferences.name: defaultEditor
preferences.title: Default Editor
preferences.description: App name to open projects in (e.g. PhpStorm, Cursor, VS Code). Can be overridden per project via .project-launcher.json

preferences.name: gitClient
preferences.title: Git Client
preferences.description: App name for the git client (e.g. Sublime Merge, Fork, Tower)

preferences.name: configEditor
preferences.title: Config Editor
preferences.description: App name to open .project-launcher.json files in (e.g. Sublime Text, VS Code). Leave empty to use the project editor.
